summary: Complete testing of Admin 2FA Authentication and Forgot Password features. All backend APIs (17 tests) passed. Frontend UI for login, 2FA, forgot password, and reset password flows all working correctly.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (5/min for login, 3/min for forgot-password) can cause test failures if run too quickly. This is expected security behavior.

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests use existing admin account and clean up after themselves (password reset back to original, 2FA disabled after testing).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin 2FA and Forgot Password features fully tested. All flows working: login with/without 2FA, 2FA setup/confirm/disable, forgot password, reset password. Rate limiting is enabled (5/min login, 3/min forgot-password) - wait 60 seconds between test runs if hitting limits.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/admin/verify-2fa: ✓ Returns access_token with valid temp_token and code
backend_api_tests.POST /api/admin/forgot-password: ✓ Returns reset_code for valid admin email

frontend_ui_tests.admin_login_page: ✓ Login form with email, password inputs and 'Glömt lösenord?' link
frontend_ui_tests.forgot_password_form: ✓ Shows email input and 'Skicka återställningskod' button
frontend_ui_tests.reset_password_form: ✓ Shows reset code input, new password, confirm password fields
frontend_ui_tests.2fa_status_not_enabled: ✓ Shows 'Tvåstegsverifiering är inte aktiverad' when disabled
frontend_ui_tests.2fa_qr_code_display: ✓ QR code and manual secret shown after clicking setup

verified_features.admin_2fa_login: ✓ Login requires 2FA when enabled, returns temp_token
verified_features.admin_2fa_verify: ✓ Verify-2fa with temp_token and code returns access_token
